data.body:
Goal:
Implement immutable execution-plan revision semantics so changing the scope or grouping of a plan creates a new plan artifact instead of mutating the old one. The relationship between plan versions should be represented with explicit edges such as `replaces` / `replaced_by`.

Verification:
1. The execution-plan model and docs state that plans are immutable.
2. Revising a plan creates a new plan artifact rather than mutating the prior one.
3. Revision relationships are representable and queryable via explicit edges.

Constraints:
- Do not overload workflow state to mean revision lineage.
- Preserve the original persisted plan document when a new revision is created.
data.title: Add immutable execution-plan revision edges
